name: 暮光之眼

sections.Background:
## Background

### Early life

Shen was the son of Master Kusho, the previous Eye of Twilight of the Kinkou, whose role was to maintain the equilibrium between the spirit and physical realms. As Shen grew up, he was a good student when it came to learning the Kinkou teachings such as Pruning the Tree, Coursing the Sun, and Watching the Stars, and he was also able to make decisions dispassionately and without prejudice.

When Zed (then known as Govos) was invited into the Kinkou order, Shen was initially much stronger than the newcomer. But Zed was a fast learner and his abilities soon rivaled Shen, but he lacked Shen’s dispassion. Yet they grew up as brothers.

At one point, Kusho, Shen, and Zed set out to hunt down the Golden Demon, a murderer who had plagued the province of Zhyun. When they captured the Golden Demon, it turned out to be Jihn, a stagehand from a traveling theater. Shen was ready to accept his father’s wish to imprison the murderer while Zed wanted to get revenge by killing him instead.

### Recent events

(TBA)

### Early life

Shen was the son of Master Kusho, the previous Eye of Twilight of the Kinkou, whose role was to maintain the equilibrium between the spirit and physical realms. As Shen grew up, he was a good student when it came to learning the Kinkou teachings such as Pruning the Tree, Coursing the Sun, and Watching the Stars, and he was also able to make decisions dispassionately and without prejudice.

When Zed (then known as Govos) was invited into the Kinkou order, Shen was initially much stronger than the newcomer. But Zed was a fast learner and his abilities soon rivaled Shen, but he lacked Shen’s dispassion. Yet they grew up as brothers.

At one point, Kusho, Shen, and Zed set out to hunt down the Golden Demon, a murderer who had plagued the province of Zhyun. sections.Appearance:
## Appearance

Shen is a tall, muscular man with tan skin and brown hair. His hair is typically tied back with the sides shaved. His eyes glow white-blue whenever he utilizes his magic.

His signature armor is a full-body ninja regalia in pristine condition. It is dark blue with a silver trim, covering all but his eyes and upper arms. Though he carries a traditional blade on his back, he can also summon a spirit blade composed of ethereal violet magic.
sections.Personality:
## Personality

Known for his dispassion, Shen is calm and even-keeled, possessing the aura of esoteric wisdom that befits his station. Extreme events, however, can cause him to become aggressive and emotional, especially in the presence of his despised rivals such as  or . Still, Shen fights honorably, striving to protect the innocent and preserve the balance of .
sections.Abilities:
## Abilities

* Spiritualist: Shen has a deep connection to the Spirit Realm, created through meditation and spiritual practices, allowing him to sense the influences of the Spirit Realm, and use it's magic for several purposes. Shen carries the Role of the Eye of Twilight, and wields the powers that comes with it.
**Transitory State: As the bridge between the Material and Spirit Worlds, Shen can shift from the Physical Realm to the Spiritual and vice-versa at will. This allows him to teleport to other's places at will, whether to avoid injuries or to aid his allies.
**Spirit Sign: Shen's  spiritual connections allow him to see spiritual forces.
sections.Relations:
## Relations

### 

Shen leads the surviving Kinkou which has a great conflict of interest with  Order of Shadow and its defiance of Ionia's sacred balance.  remains by his side while  went rogue. She and  parted on neutral terms. Neither hates the other but both disapprove of the other's methods. After  and  made their choice, Shen is starting to doubt whether the old way still works.

### 

Shen and  are childhood friends and used to consider each other as brother before  "murdered" Master Kusho. Master Kusho, Shen, and Zed were responsible for capturing and imprisoning , but were traumatised by the Golden Demon's actions in the process. Later on, when Jhin was set free again, Zed sought out Shen in order to inform him about Jhin's reappearance and to team up with him to stop him. Shen, despite still wishing to avenge his father's death, accepted the truce for the greater good. The duo later saved a captured  from  and caught him. Shen is torn between killing Zed to avenge his father Kusho (the Kinkou's previous master and wielder of the ) and enforcing equilibrium with the spirit realm (his duty takes priority, but he won't hesitate if given the chance). Zed could have revealed the truth about Kusho to Shen but then decided it was better for Shen to be disillusioned with Zed than to be disillusioned with his own father. That's probably not fair, and maybe Shen has a right to know. But Zed is flawed... and blinded by his need to feel he's worthy and honorable.

### Yevnai
 
Shen was arranged to be married to Yevnai but the engagement was called off after  "killed" Master Kusho.  and Yevnai were at one point secretly in a relationship even when forbidden by Master Kusho, unknown to Shen though he possibly suspected it.

title: 慎
cn_description: 他既是精神领域中的神秘人，也是凡人世界里的异类，但慎不属于二者任何一方。虽然他的出身是纳沃利北部的名门之后，但真正注定他与均衡教派不解之缘的，是他父亲作为暮光之眼的身份。作为教派宗师苦说的儿子，他从小受到均衡教派文化的熏陶，均衡的核心教旨对他来说就像艾欧尼亚的日落一样熟悉而优美。他懂得修枝的不可或缺，逐日的坚定不移，还有最重要的，观星的亘古智慧。他整个童年都是在冥想与研习中渡过的，所有老师都对他赞不绝口。他最亲密的朋友，也是唯一一个能在切磋中与他不相上下的学徒，是作为同龄人的劫。他们情同手足，经常互相吐露心中私密的希望和梦想。慎凡世都可以从劫那里寻求崭新的视角，两名少年被认为是均衡教派最有前途的学徒。随着他们的技艺日益精进，苦说大师开始带上他们出门执行较为危险的任务，其中就包括追猎芝云省的祸害，“金魔”。他们的搜寻持续了数年，虽然慎见证了无数惨不忍睹的谋杀现场，但他始终都心无旁骛。当他们最后终于抓到“金魔”的时候，却发现他只是个巡回剧团中的舞台助手。苦说大师没有将其就地正法，而是将他关进了监狱。虽然慎和劫都认为这个凶手应当被处以更严厉的刑罚，但慎接受了父亲的决定。他努力效仿暮光之眼的冷漠，因此也没能够安慰劫的苦楚和憎恨。即使当诺克萨斯入侵者威胁到初生之土的和平，慎也压抑住心中的不安，支持了苦说大师的不作为。但当背弃了均衡的劫加入战斗的时候，慎选择留在庙墙之中。许多省份都迅速被敌人占领。但慎依然专注于维护艾欧尼亚精神领域的和谐。那一天，远离家乡的慎感到均衡教派内部剧烈震荡失衡，全速赶回的他只看到了一场血腥哗变的幸存者。他们告诉慎，劫已经自立流派，还召集了一众学徒，将均衡教派的庙堂占为己有。最糟的是，慎的父亲被曾经那个与他情同手足的人弑杀了。他抑制住自己的剧痛，带领均衡的残部前往山中避难。慎拿起了父亲的魂刃，也继承了暮光之眼的称号。他要扮演的角色并不是寻求复仇，而是重建教派。他遵循着核心教旨，开始了纳新和训练，希望能够重振教派的力量。一位特殊的学徒展现出了无边的潜力。慎亲自传授给那个女孩——阿卡丽·约曼·特曦潜行术和遁形术。她的母亲梅目曾以暗影之拳之名与苦说并肩作战，如今看来女儿也将遵循母亲的道路成长。然而，阿卡丽无数次想要反击他们的人类敌人，每每遇到这种情况，慎都不得不敦促她保持克制。当诺克萨斯最终撤退，许多艾欧尼亚人都庆祝反抗的胜利。而其他人，例如慎，则承担着战争的创伤——他恪尽职守，但同时也暗自纠结于自己对劫的憎恨之情，并怀疑自己担任领袖的能力。连年的战乱让初生之土付出了沉重的代价，慎也不确定，重建均衡教派是否真的能够让这片土地也重归平衡。他的担心应验了，就在阿卡丽接任暗影之拳的同时，他感受到她正在渐行渐远，不久后，她就公开否决他的教诲，然后离开了教派。慎进行了观星冥想，他理解阿卡丽需要找到自己的路……均衡教派也是一样。有的时候，在精神领域进行隐秘斗争的间隙，慎还是会思考自己信念的价值。他从未让自己的情绪妨碍自己保护传统的职责，但问题依然没有答案：一个行走于两个世界的人，究竟还剩下多长时间，就不得不面对一个世界里的行为给另一个世界带来的毁灭？
cn_og_title: 慎 - 英雄传记 - 《英雄联盟》宇宙
